info.description: Identity Provider for the Unified School System Capstone.
info.title: Unified Access Identity Provider API

get.description: Retrieve the JSON Web Key Set for verifying JWT signatures
Fetch all client IDs and names managed by the admin.
Get a paginated list of all accounts that have a role

put.description: Updates user client access mapping within the admin's scope.

post.description: Authenticate user and return a redirect URL with auth code
Clear session cookie and revoke all issued tokens for the user
Invalidates old refresh token and issues a new pair

get.description: Validate the idp_session cookie against the database

post.description: Validates the code and client secret to issue JWT and Refresh

get.description: Returns a paginated list of audit logs with optional filters.
Returns a single audit log entry.
Get a paginated list of all users

post.description: Register a new user with roles and encrypted password

get.description: Fetch user details using their unique ID

delete.description: Mark a user as deleted by ID

patch.description: Updates the password for a specific user identified by ID.
Modifies the status (e.g., active, disabled) of a user by ID.

get.description: Validates the authorization request for the user.

patch.description: Updates the secret key associated with a specific client ID.

get.description: Returns user profile filtered by client allowed roles

patch.description: Updates a user's role based on the request body.

post.description: Creates client, saves icon, hashes secret, and maps roles
post.summary: Register a new Service Provider with Icon

get.description: Fetch full details including grants and roles

put.description: Update safe fields (Name, Description, URLs, Image)

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of non-deleted roles

post.description: Adds a new global or SP-prefixed role to the system

get.description: Fetches full details of a specific role

delete.description: Marks a role as deleted in the audit trail
